Hi Fernanda, the shipment file is ready. Let us open it together.
Sure. I am sharing my screen. What is the first step?
First, open the trading folder. Then click on the file called Colombia.
Done. The file is open. Now what?
Scroll down to the new dates and check them. Please do not save it yet.
Okay, I am scrolling. The dates look good. Should I type something?
Yes. Type your name at the bottom, then save the file.
Saved. One thing: do not send it to the supplier yet. Let us review it tomorrow.

Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I am calling about the shipment file. Listen, it is easy. First, open the trading folder on the shared drive. Then, click on the file called Colombia. Do not save it yet, please. Scroll down to the new dates and check them. After that, type your name at the bottom and save the file. If something looks wrong, do not change it. Just call me back and we will fix it together. Thank you so much. Talk soon.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Thank you for the steps. I did it. First, I opened the trading folder and I clicked on the Colombia file. Then I scrolled down and I checked the new dates. They look good. I typed my name and I saved the file. One quick thing: please do not send it to the supplier yet. Let's review it together on our call tomorrow first. Talk soon.
